title: Tea Plantation, India
story: This photograph was captured during a peaceful morning in the tea plantations of Darjeeling. What began as a quiet landscape soon travelled far beyond my camera and was later featured by the Harvard International Review. It reminds me how a single moment, captured with love, can become part of a much larger story.

publishedIn.title: Soil Degradation and Crippling Debt: The Agrarian Crisis in India
